2143250.name: Don't Underestimate Me
2143250.description:
Don't Underestimate Me is a 2D bullet hell game in top-down for PC, with its objective being to tell the stories of unique characters, who are anthropomorphic animals in space. Spaceship captains, trading center owners, spacecraft engineers, and many others try to understand each other and solve their personal problems.

Plot

Sunny Den is a spaceship, part of an organization with the role of investigating and solving several problems that are reported to their HQ.

Within the ship, the story revolves around Captain Honey: a female snake with great strength as a leader. She wishes to redeem herself from a dark past by changing her ways of solving problems through pacifist means.

That new way of thinking brews doubt from members of her own crew and leads other spaceship captains to oppose her while underestimating her ability to achieve her goals with that kind of mentality.

The Game

Dodge whatever space throws your way


Get to know many unique characters


Become their target while trying to progress
